mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} AND status = 1
SELECT r.role_key FROM sys_user_role ur INNER JOIN sys_role r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.status = 1

SELECT DISTINCT m.permission FROM sys_user_role ur INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON ur.role_id = rm.role_id INNER JOIN sys_menu m ON rm.menu_id = m.id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.status = 1 AND m.permission != '' AND m.permission IS NOT NULL
